title: Senior Plant Manager at Samsung India Electronics

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Samsung India Electronics
jsonLd.description:
Samsung India Electronics has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Samsung India Electronics:
Samsung India Electronics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Samsung India Electronics!
